fields.heading: Choose the next step that fits your role.
fields.body: Careers at Wink, where hospitality, social commerce, travel technology and payments meet. Help independent hotels own their distribution.

cards.title: Hotel problems first.
cards.body: We start from practical hotel and Partner workflows, then build product paths around them.

cards.title: Commerce needs detail.
cards.body: Rates, inventory, attribution, checkout, payment, and reporting all need careful product thinking.

cards.title: Learning stays close to users.
cards.body: Good ideas should be tested against how hotels, Partners, and platforms actually work.

fields.heading: Ready to make hotel demand bookable?
fields.body: Start with the route that matches your team, then move into a focused demo or sign-up flow.
